user.title: Connect Inventory
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your pantry-server instance.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Inventory
reconfigure.description: Update the pantry-server connection for this Inventory entry.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Inventory integration is allowed.

init.title: Locations
init.description: Add a new location or manage one of your existing locations.

menu_option_descriptions.connection: Update the pantry-server URL, API key, or polling settings.
menu_option_descriptions.add_location: Create a new pantry location in pantry-server.
menu_option_descriptions.select_location: Rename a location, change its local icon, or delete it.

connection.title: Connection Settings
connection.description: Update the pantry-server connection for this Inventory entry.

add_location.title: Add Location
add_location.description: Create a new server-backed storage location.

select_location.title: Select Location
select_location.description: Choose the location you want to update.

manage_location.title: Manage Location
manage_location.description: Choose what you want to change for {location_name}.

rename_location.title: Rename Location
rename_location.description: Update the server-backed name and local icon for this location.

delete_location.title: Delete Location
delete_location.description: Are you sure you want to delete '{location_name}'? This will remove {item_count} item(s).

error.name_exists: A location with this name already exists.
error.location_not_found: The selected location no longer exists.
error.location_not_empty: The location must be empty before it can be deleted.
